task_completion.description: Open and read the dual GPS specifications document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/dual_gps_specs.txt'.
The QGroundControl (QGC) application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Parameters setup screen in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC interface shows the 'Vehicle Setup' menu with the 'Parameters' section selected, displaying a list of parameters or a search bar.

task_completion.description: Set the secondary GPS type and auto-switch parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter list or editor dialog, 'GPS_TYPE2' is set to 1 (or 'Auto') and 'GPS_AUTO_SWITCH' is set to 2 (or 'Blend').

task_completion.description: Set the EK3 yaw source and disable the compass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter list or editor dialog, 'EK3_SRC1_YAW' is set to 2 (or 'GPS') and 'COMPASS_ENABLE' is set to 0.

task_completion.description: Set the GPS antenna offsets using the ArduPilot NED coordinate system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC parameter list, the offsets are set as follows: 'GPS_POS1_X' = -0.35, 'GPS_POS2_X' = 0.35, 'GPS_POS1_Z' = -0.2, and 'GPS_POS2_Z' = -0.2.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the QGC menus, using the parameter search bar, and interacting with the parameter editor dialogs, rather than using a terminal script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the backend result JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal should be shown manually writing JSON data to '/tmp/task_result.json'.

integrity.description: The agent modified the parameters within the actual QGC application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Parameter changes must be visible inside the QGroundControl application window, not in a mock text file or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specifications document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dual_gps_specs.txt. The expected parameter values to be set in QGroundControl are: GPS_TYPE2 = 1, GPS_AUTO_SWITCH = 2, EK3_SRC1_YAW = 2, COMPASS_ENABLE = 0. For the antenna offsets in the NED coordinate system (where Down is +Z and North is +X), the values must be: GPS_POS1_X = -0.35, GPS_POS2_X = 0.35, GPS_POS1_Z = -0.2, and GPS_POS2_Z = -0.2.
